---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Clareifi Notes
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Phase Relevance
Which phase does this relate to?
- [ ] Phase 1 — Core encryption / notes
- [ ] Phase 2 — Sharing & content types
- [ ] Phase 3 — SaaS / production
- [ ] Future / post-launch

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What's the current pain point?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Privacy / Security Considerations
Does this feature have any implications for the E2EE model or the public/private boundary?
- [ ] No impact on encryption or privacy
- [ ] Touches the encryption layer (please explain below)
- [ ] Changes the public/private boundary (please explain below)

Details:

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
